tokens: Dave, we want Steering Forward, Off.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Oh, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: As you drive away there, I was a little hasty on my time call (at
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Okay, we're moving out again at about 7 - 8 clicks.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: If we can just find...(Pause) As we drive along, there's several craters 3 to 5 meters in diameter.
There's a rather large one out at 1 o'clock to us now.
It looks fairly recent; there are a lot of angular blocks on the rim of it.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Jim, let me interrupt one second here.
Can you confirm that your DAC (the 16-mm camera) is stopped?
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Boy, that's a nice fresh one.
(Pause) Sure hate to go by that one.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay, if we don't find a better crater, that might be a better one to come by.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Yes, that's the freshest we've seen.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Oh, I see a...Oh, there's another fresh one over there at about 11 o'clock.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Okay, it's about 20 (to) 25 meters across, and it looked like it excavated the bedrock; it had a very blocky ejecta blanket and blocky rims, and the ejecta blanket was about halfway out.
Blocks on the order of about a foot and a half at the largest.
And (some of the blocks are) subangular (that is, the edges and corners are slightly rounded), some quite angular.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Bet there's glass in the bottom of that one.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Yeah, we're starting a slight upslope now.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Pause) And what a beautiful view looking up that slope.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Isn't that; and you can see the
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: It would be great if we could get up to that rather large...(Garbled) I think that's too far away, Dave.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Man, this is getting...Ho, ho, ho.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Deep, but there's not much fresh ejecta around them.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Man, steep slopes; that must be 30 degrees on the side.
And a little old crater that couldn't be more than 10 meters across.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Now, there are some blocks now that look like they're a foot (across).
Seems like they're on the surface, Dave.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Most of them have been buried at this time, and those seem like they're right on the...
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Yeah, they're right on the surface for some reason.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Oh, that antenna (possibly the low gain, even though the comm does not seem to have degraded) fell down.
(Pause) Okay, Joe, we're going uphill pretty good.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Your updated range at station 2 is about 3.9 clicks (kilometers).
And if you'll park down-Sun, we'll give you a Nav update when you climb back on.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: But it looks awful rough up there, doesn't it?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Yeah, and it's probably farther away, Dave, than we could go.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Yeah, we'll just keep mushing along here.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: There's a large block - looks like about a 5-footer - out at 1 o'clock.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: You can tell we're going uphill.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Yeah, speed's dropped down to 7 clicks.
(Pause) Yeah, if we just go straight over to that big one.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Any place that looks good to the two of you.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Well, it looks fairly...(Responding to Joe) Okay; we're going to a big block here, Joe.
It's one we just can't afford to miss.
Wanted us to look at a big block; we're going to look at a big block.
It's the only big block I see anywhere.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Hey, we could get to that fresh one, too, Jim.
Boy, this'll give them a view.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Yeah, look that...What a view back into the rille.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: There's almost a view right into that crater.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Glad you stopped short of it.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I got to go down-Sun just a minute.
I want to back up just a tad.
(Pause) Okay; as far as we can...(Pause)
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And, Jim, as you look back, can you see the Rover tracks?
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: I saw them when we stopped at the last stop.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Pause) Sounds like the old Hansel and Gretel trick'll work.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: We're there, Jim; you can get off.
You can try and get off.
